linting.notes: Makefile 'verify' target runs: uv lock --check, ruff check, ruff format --check, and ty check. Pre-commit hooks configured with ruff-check and ruff-format.

testing.notes: Tests are co-located with source code using *_test.py naming. 548 tests total. Markers: integration, slow, smoke, timeout, options. Some tests may require Kubernetes cluster (marked as 'integration'). Spark extra required for full test suite.

gating_checks.name: Unit Test - Python
gating_checks.notes: Runs on all PRs. Includes lint (ruff check, ruff format, ty check) and unit tests with coverage.

gating_checks.name: Validate Lockfile Security
gating_checks.notes: Runs when uv.lock or pyproject.toml change. Ensures lockfile is in sync and checks for CVE regressions.

gating_checks.name: Check PR Title
gating_checks.notes: Validates PR title follows conventional commits (chore, fix, feat, revert). Scopes: ci, docs, deps, examples, scripts, test, trainer.

gating_checks.name: Documentation
gating_checks.command: uv sync --group docs && uv run sphinx-build -b html docs/source docs/_build/html
gating_checks.notes: Runs when docs/, kubeflow/, .readthedocs.yaml, or docs workflow change. Ensures documentation builds successfully.

advisory_checks.name: E2E Tests
advisory_checks.notes: Requires Kind cluster with Spark operator. Runs on manual trigger or labeled PRs.

advisory_checks.name: Snyk Security Scan
advisory_checks.notes: Security vulnerability scanning. May produce warnings but not blocking.

advisory_checks.name: Trivy CVE Scan
advisory_checks.notes: Container and dependency CVE scanning. Advisory only.

ci.notes: CI uses Python 3.11. UV is installed via astral-sh/setup-uv@v5 action. Coverage uploaded to Coveralls.

build.notes: Pure Python package. No compilation step. Optional extras: docker, podman, rhai, spark, hub. Dev dependencies include pytest, coverage, ruff, pre-commit. UV is modern Python package manager (replacement for pip/poetry). Install UV: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh

conventions.test_naming: test_* functions in *_test.py files, co-located with source code
conventions.import_style: Absolute imports from kubeflow package. First-party imports grouped and sorted by isort rules in ruff config.
conventions.notes: Line length: 100 chars. Target Python 3.10+. Quote style: double. Tests use pytest markers for categorization. Pre-commit hooks enforce formatting and linting.

setup_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y make git curl

test_commands.notes: 60% coverage - 4995 statements, 1983 missed, 41 files with 100% coverage

container_recipe.notes: All commands validated successfully in container. UV installs to $HOME/.local/bin. No external services required for unit tests. Integration tests (marked with @pytest.mark.integration) require Kind cluster but are not run by default.

results.command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y make git curl

results.notes: All dependencies synced including git dependencies from kubeflow repos
Type checking passed for hub module
60% code coverage, 41 files with 100% coverage skipped

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (no violations), format OK, type check OK, tests OK (548 passed), coverage 60%

gaps: E2E tests require Kind cluster with Spark operator - not validated in container
Some backends (docker/podman local execution) have low test coverage (16-21%) but this doesn't block basic validation
Documentation build not validated (would require sphinx and doc dependencies)
